# PM Dispatch

> Free product management tools and weekly newsletter, built by a Chief Product Officer with 10+ years in mobile gaming.

## What is PM Dispatch?

PM Dispatch (https://www.pmdispatch.com) is a free, no-login-required toolkit for product managers. Every tool runs entirely in the browser — no account, no paywall, no data sent to a server.

## Tools

- **RICE Prioritization Calculator** — Score backlog items by Reach, Impact, Confidence, and Effort to make data-driven prioritization decisions
- **Stats Lab** — Frequentist A/B test significance testing, Bayesian conversion and retention analysis, and ARPU comparison calculator
- **Growth Tools** — ROAS calculator, customer lifetime value (LTV) modeler, ad revenue projector, and cohort retention analysis
- **A/B Sample Size Calculator** — Calculate minimum detectable effect (MDE)-based sample sizes for conversion rate, retention, and ARPU experiments
- **PM Playbook** — Step-by-step guides on sprint planning, writing a PRD, setting OKRs, user research, and roadmap prioritization
- **Daily PM Insight** — One product management insight per day from a rotating library of frameworks and tactics
- **Gaming News** — Curated mobile gaming industry news for product managers

## Newsletter

PM Dispatch publishes a free weekly newsletter covering product management strategy, mobile game monetization, growth tactics, and PM career development.

Subscribe: https://www.pmdispatch.com
Beehiiv: https://pm-dispatch.beehiiv.com

## Author

Arturo Ruiz Valdés — Chief Product Officer with 10+ years in mobile gaming.
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/arturoruizvaldes/

## Technical

- Single-page web application, no backend
- Hosted on GitHub Pages at https://www.pmdispatch.com
- All calculations run client-side in the browser
- Free forever, no login required
